tagEnum - Variable in class tif.DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD
 
TagExif_Interop - Enum in tif.tagspecs
Exif Interoperability sub-directory metadata tags identified within the DirectoryIdentifier.EXIF_INTEROP_DIRECTORY scope.
TagExif_Interop(int, String) - Constructor for enum tif.tagspecs.TagExif_Interop
 
TagExif_Interop(int, String, TagHint) - Constructor for enum tif.tagspecs.TagExif_Interop
 
Taggable - Interface in tif.tagspecs
 
TagHint - Enum in tif
Structural type hints mapping low-level binary TIFF/Exif fields to high-level Java data types.
TagHint(String) - Constructor for enum tif.TagHint
 
TagIFD_Baseline - Enum in tif.tagspecs
Defines the baseline TIFF tags specified by the TIFF Revision 6.0 specification.
TagIFD_Baseline(int, String) - Constructor for enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Baseline
Constructs a baseline TIFF tag using the default hint.
TagIFD_Baseline(int, String, TagHint) - Constructor for enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Baseline
Constructs a baseline TIFF tag with an explicit data type hint.
TagIFD_DNG - Enum in tif.tagspecs
Defines Adobe Digital Negative (DNG) tags used in TIFF-based image files.
TagIFD_DNG(int, String) - Constructor for enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_DNG
 
TagIFD_DNG(int, String, TagHint) - Constructor for enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_DNG
 
TagIFD_Exif - Enum in tif.tagspecs
Exchangeable Image File Format (Exif) sub-directory metadata tags within the DirectoryIdentifier.IFD_EXIF_SUBIFD_DIRECTORY scope.
TagIFD_Exif(int, String) - Constructor for enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
 
TagIFD_Exif(int, String, TagHint) - Constructor for enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
 
TagIFD_Extension - Enum in tif.tagspecs
Defines TIFF extension tags specified by TIFF 6.0 and commonly encountered platform-specific extensions.
TagIFD_Extension(int, String) - Constructor for enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Extension
Constructs an extension TIFF tag using the default hint.
TagIFD_Extension(int, String, TagHint) - Constructor for enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Extension
Constructs an extension TIFF tag with an explicit value hint.
TagIFD_GPS - Enum in tif.tagspecs
Global Positioning System (GPS) sub-directory metadata tags within the DirectoryIdentifier.IFD_GPS_SUBIFD_DIRECTORY scope.
TagIFD_GPS(int, String) - Constructor for enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_GPS
 
TagIFD_GPS(int, String, TagHint) - Constructor for enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_GPS
 
TagIFD_Pointer - Enum in tif.tagspecs
Structural offset pointer tags used to navigate between TIFF sub-directories.
TagIFD_Pointer(int, String, DirectoryIdentifier, DirectoryIdentifier) - Constructor for enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Pointer
 
TagIFD_Private - Enum in tif.tagspecs
Private, vendor-specific, and industry-standard TIFF tags defined within the DirectoryIdentifier.IFD_ROOT_DIRECTORY scope.
TagIFD_Private(int, String) - Constructor for enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Private
 
TagIFD_Private(int, String, TagHint) - Constructor for enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Private

TagIFD_Unknown(int, DirectoryIdentifier) - Constructor for class tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Unknown
 
TagRegistry - Class in tif.tagspecs
Central registry that maps TIFF tag IDs and directory types to their corresponding Taggable definitions.
TagRegistry() - Constructor for class tif.tagspecs.TagRegistry
Default constructor is unsupported and will always throw an exception.
TagValueTranslator - Class in tif
Utility methods for converting parsed TIFF metadata values into strongly-typed Java representations.
TagValueTranslator() - Constructor for class tif.TagValueTranslator
Default constructor will always throw an exception.

Sets the target directory where the processed files will be saved.
target - Variable in class batch.BatchConfiguration
 
targetDir - Variable in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Pointer
 
targetField - Variable in class gui.MediaMetadataApp
 
targetItemIDs - Variable in class heif.boxes.ItemReferenceBox.SingleItemTypeReferenceBox

testDump() - Method in class xmp.XmpHandlerOld
Utility method to dump all properties using the Adobe XMP SDK (XMPCore library).

text - Variable in class png.PngChunkTEXT
 
text - Variable in class png.PngChunkZTXT

textKeyword - Variable in class png.PngChunkTEXT

TextKeyword - Enum in png
Enumerates standard and common PNG textual metadata keywords found in tEXt, iTXt, and zTXt chunks.
TextKeyword(String) - Constructor for enum png.TextKeyword
 
TextKeyword(String, TagHint) - Constructor for enum png.TextKeyword
 
TextualChunk - Interface in png
Common interface for PNG textual metadata chunks (tEXt, zTXt, iTXt).
tif - package tif
Classes for parsing and manipulating TIFF-based files.
tif.tagspecs - package tif.tagspecs
 
TIFF_BIG_VERSION - Static variable in class tif.IFDHandler
 
TIFF_STANDARD_VERSION - Static variable in class tif.IFDHandler
 
TiffDatePatcher - Class in tif
Performs in-place "surgical patching" of specific timestamp entries.
TiffDatePatcher() - Constructor for class tif.TiffDatePatcher
Default constructor is unsupported and will always throw an exception.
TifFieldType - Enum in tif
An enumeration class of data format types defined in the TIFF specification 6.0 document.
TifFieldType(int, String, int) - Constructor for enum tif.TifFieldType
 
TifMetadata - Class in tif
A container for storing information on extracted TIFF-based metadata, including EXIF and XMP segments.
TifMetadata() - Constructor for class tif.TifMetadata
Constructs an empty metadata container configured for TIFF parsing by default.
TifMetadata(DigitalSignature) - Constructor for class tif.TifMetadata
Constructs a metadata container for a specific image format layout.
TifMetadata(DigitalSignature, ByteOrder) - Constructor for class tif.TifMetadata
Constructs a new metadata container with a specific format identity and byte order.
TifMetadataProvider - Interface in tif
A dedicated interface for accessing and managing TIFF-based metadata structures.
TifParser - Class in tif
A concrete implementation of AbstractImageParser for extracting metadata from TIFF files.
TifParser(Path) - Constructor for class tif.TifParser
Creates an instance intended for parsing the specified TIFF image file.
TifParser(String) - Constructor for class tif.TifParser
Creates an instance for parsing the specified TIFF image file.
toByteArray(Object) - Static method in class tif.TagValueTranslator
Returns the value as a byte array.
toByteValue(Object) - Static method in class tif.TagValueTranslator
Returns the value as a byte.
toDouble(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.binary.ByteValueConverterBB
 
toDouble(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Decodes the first eight bytes of a byte array into a 64-bit IEEE-754 double value using the specified byte order.
toDouble(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Decodes eight bytes starting at the specified offset into a 64-bit IEEE-754 double value using the specified byte order.
toDoubleArray(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.binary.ByteValueConverterBB
 
toDoubleArray(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Convenience method for decoding an entire byte array into an array of 64-bit double values.
toDoubleArray(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Convenience method for decoding a byte array into an array of 64-bit double values starting from the specified offset.
toDoubleArray(Object) - Static method in class tif.TagValueTranslator
Converts the specified value to an array of doubles.
toFloat(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.binary.ByteValueConverterBB
 
toFloat(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Decodes the first four bytes of a byte array into a 32-bit floating-point value using the specified byte order.
toFloat(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Decodes four bytes starting at the specified offset into a 32-bit floating-point value using the specified byte order.
toFloatArray(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.binary.ByteValueConverterBB
 
toFloatArray(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Convenience method for decoding an entire byte array into an array of 32-bit floating-point values.
toFloatArray(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Convenience method for decoding a byte array into an array of 32-bit floating-point values starting at the specified offset.
toFloatArray(Object) - Static method in class tif.TagValueTranslator
Converts a value to a float array.
toHex(byte[]) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Converts a byte array to a hexadecimal string representation.
toHexTable(byte[]) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Generates a hexadecimal table for debugging byte arrays.
toIntArray(Object) - Static method in class tif.TagValueTranslator
Converts a value to an integer array.
toInteger(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.binary.ByteValueConverterBB
 
toInteger(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Decodes the first four bytes of a byte array into a 32-bit signed integer value using the specified byte order.
toInteger(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Decodes four bytes starting at the specified offset into a 32-bit signed integer value using the specified byte order.
toIntegerArray(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.binary.ByteValueConverterBB
 
toIntegerArray(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Convenience method for decoding an entire byte array into an array of 32-bit signed integer values.
toIntegerArray(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Convenience method for decoding a byte array into an array of 32-bit signed integer values starting at the specified offset.
toLong(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.binary.ByteValueConverterBB
 
toLong(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Decodes the first eight bytes of a byte array into a 64-bit signed long value using the specified byte order.
toLong(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Decodes eight bytes starting at the specified offset into a 64-bit signed long value using the specified byte order.
toLongArray(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.binary.ByteValueConverterBB
 
toLongArray(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Convenience method for decoding an entire byte array into an array of 64-bit long values.
toLongArray(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Convenience method for decoding a byte array into an array of 64-bit signed long values starting at the specified offset.
toLongArray(Object) - Static method in class tif.TagValueTranslator
Converts a value to a long array.
toRational(byte[], int, ByteOrder, RationalNumber.DataType) - Static method in class common.binary.ByteValueConverterBB
 
toRational(byte[], ByteOrder, RationalNumber.DataType) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Decodes the first 8 bytes of the input array into a RationalNumber object.
toRational(byte[], int, ByteOrder, RationalNumber.DataType) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Decodes an 8-byte segment from the input array into a RationalNumber, starting at the specified offset.
toRationalArray(byte[], int, ByteOrder, RationalNumber.DataType) - Static method in class common.binary.ByteValueConverterBB
 
toRationalArray(byte[], int, ByteOrder, RationalNumber.DataType) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Converts a byte array into an array of RationalNumber objects, interpreting each 8-byte segment as a numerator-denominator pair starting at the specified offset.
toRationalArray(byte[], ByteOrder, RationalNumber.DataType) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Deprecated.
toRationalArray(Object) - Static method in class tif.TagValueTranslator
Converts a value to a rational number array.
toShort(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.binary.ByteValueConverterBB
 
toShort(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Decodes the first two bytes of a byte array into a 16-bit signed short value using the specified byte order.
toShort(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Decodes two bytes starting at the specified offset into a 16-bit signed short value using the specified byte order.
toSimpleString(boolean) - Method in class tif.RationalNumber
Returns a clean, human-readable string representation of the rational number, favouring a simple integer or clean decimal string over a fractional notation where appropriate.
toString() - Method in class batch.MediaRecord
Returns a formatted string representation of the media record, suitable for CLI display or debug logging.
toString() - Method in class png.ChunkHandler
Returns a textual representation of all parsed PNG chunks in this file.
toString() - Method in class png.PngChunk
Returns a string representation of the chunk's properties and contents.
toString() - Method in class png.PngChunkGAMA
Returns a string representation of the chunk's properties and structural metadata.
toString() - Method in class png.PngChunkIHDR
Returns a string representation of the chunk's properties and structural metadata.
toString() - Method in class png.PngChunkITXT
Returns a string representation of the chunk's properties and contents.
toString() - Method in class png.PngChunkPHYS
Returns a string representation of the chunk's properties and structural metadata.
toString() - Method in class png.PngChunkSRGB
Returns a string representation of the chunk's properties and structural metadata.
toString() - Method in class png.PngChunkTEXT
Returns a string representation of the chunk's properties and contents.
toString() - Method in class png.PngChunkTIME
Returns a string representation of the chunk's properties and contents.
toString() - Method in class png.PngChunkZTXT
Returns a string representation of the chunk's properties and contents.
toString() - Method in class png.PngDirectory
Returns a string representation of this directory, which is the concatenation of the string representations of all contained PngChunk objects, each on a new line.
toString() - Method in class png.PngMetadata
Generates a formatted representation of the stored PNG metadata.
toString() - Method in class tif.DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD
Generates a human-readable summary of the entry, suitable for logging or metadata inspection.
toString() - Method in class tif.DirectoryIFD
Generates a formatted string showing current values of every IFD entry in the collection.
toString() - Method in class tif.RationalNumber
Generates a structural string representation of the fraction alongside a 4-digit decimal fallback.
toString() - Method in class webp.RiffHandler
Returns a string summary of all parsed chunks.
toString() - Method in class webp.WebpChunk
Returns a string representation of the chunk's properties and contents.
toString() - Method in class xmp.XmpDirectory
Returns a formatted textual representation of all stored XMP properties.
toString() - Method in class xmp.XmpDirectory.XmpRecord
 
toStringValue(DirectoryIFD.EntryIFD) - Static method in class tif.TagValueTranslator
Returns an IFD entry's value as a readable text representation.
toStringValue(Object, TagHint) - Static method in class tif.TagValueTranslator
Converts a raw metadata payload value into a trimmed human-readable string representation.
toUnsignedInteger(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.binary.ByteValueConverterBB
 
toUnsignedInteger(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Decodes the first four bytes of a byte array into a 32-bit unsigned integer value using the specified byte order.

Decodes four bytes starting at the specified offset into a 32-bit unsigned integer value using the specified byte order.
toUnsignedShort(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.binary.ByteValueConverterBB
 
toUnsignedShort(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Decodes the first two bytes of a byte array into a 16-bit unsigned short value using the specified byte order.
toUnsignedShort(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Decodes two bytes starting at the specified offset into a 16-bit unsigned short value using the specified byte order.
toUnsignedShortArray(byte[], ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Convenience method for decoding an entire byte array into an array of 16-bit unsigned short values.
toUnsignedShortArray(byte[], int, ByteOrder) - Static method in class common.ByteValueConverter
Convenience method for decoding a byte array into an array of 16-bit unsigned short values starting at the specified offset.
toZonedDateTime(Object) - Static method in class tif.TagValueTranslator
Converts a value to a ZonedDateTime.
transferCharacteristics - Variable in class heif.boxes.ColourInformationBox
 
translate(Object) - Method in interface tif.tagspecs.Taggable
Converts a raw tag value into a display string.
translate(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Baseline
Converts known TIFF enumerated values into human-readable text.
translate(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_DNG
Converts known DNG values into human-readable text.
translate(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
 
translate(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Extension
Converts known TIFF extension tag values into human-readable text.
translate(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_GPS
Converts a raw tag value into a display string.
translate(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Private
Converts a raw tag value into a display string.
translate(Object) - Method in enum xmp.XmpProperty
Translates the supplied metadata value into a more human-readable representation where applicable.
translateAlphaChannelNames(ByteArrayReader, int, PropertyDisplay) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.PhotoshopManager
Parses Alpha Channel Names (0x03EE).
translateAltitudeRef(Object) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.GpsDataManager
Translates a GPS altitude reference.
translateApexAperture(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
Converts an APEX aperture value into an f-number.
translateApexShutterSpeed(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
Converts an APEX shutter speed value into an exposure time.
translateCleanFax(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Extension
Translates CleanFaxData values into descriptive status labels.
translateColorHalftoningInfo(ByteArrayReader, PropertyDisplay) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.PhotoshopManager
Parses the Colour Halftoning Information Image Resource Block (0x03F5) by decoding Photoshop's 18-byte fixed-point channel structure, following the parsing logic used by Phil Harvey's ExifTool.
translateColorReference(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_DNG
Translates a colourimetric reference value.
translateColorSpace(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
Converts an EXIF ColorSpace value into a colour-space description.
translateColorTransferFunctions(ByteArrayReader, PropertyDisplay) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.PhotoshopManager
Parses Color Transfer Functions (0x03F8).
translateColorType() - Method in class png.PngChunkIHDR
Returns a human-readable description of the PNG colour type.
translateComponentsConfiguration(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
Translates the layout configuration of channels for UNDEFINED values.
translateCompositeImage(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
Translates the CompositeImage enumeration integers into reader-friendly strings.
translateCompression(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Baseline
Translates TIFF compression scheme values into descriptive text labels.
translateCompressionMethod() - Method in class png.PngChunkIHDR
Returns a human-readable description of the compression method.
translateCustomRendered(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
Converts an EXIF CustomRendered value into a human-readable description.
translateDepthFormat(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_DNG
Translates a depth format value.
translateDepthMeasureType(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_DNG
Translates a depth measurement type.
translateDepthUnits(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_DNG
Translates a DepthUnits value into a descriptive string.
translateDestDistanceRef(Object) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.GpsDataManager
Translates a GPS destination distance reference.
translateDifferential(Object) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.GpsDataManager
Translates a GPS differential correction status.
translateDirectionRef(Object) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.GpsDataManager
Translates a GPS direction reference.
translatedKeyword - Variable in class png.PngChunkITXT
 
translateExifSchema(String) - Method in enum xmp.XmpProperty
Translates EXIF enumeration values into descriptive text.
translateExposureMode(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
Converts an EXIF ExposureMode value into a human-readable description.
translateExposureProgram(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
Translates the EXIF ExposureProgram enumeration.
translateExtraSamples(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Baseline
 
translateFaxProfile(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Extension
Translates FaxProfile values into their standardized ITU-T profile names.
translateFillOrder(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Baseline
 
translateFilterMethod() - Method in class png.PngChunkIHDR
Returns a human-readable description of the filter method.
translateFlash(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
Translates the EXIF Flash bit-field into a descriptive string.
translateGainControl(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
Converts an EXIF GainControl value into a human-readable description.
translateGamma() - Method in class png.PngChunkGAMA
Converts the stored PNG gamma value into a human-readable display gamma, using the reciprocal of the encoded value to match ExifTool's output.
translateGlobalAltitude(ByteArrayReader, PropertyDisplay) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.PhotoshopManager
Parses the global lighting altitude (0x0419).
translateGlobalAngle(ByteArrayReader, PropertyDisplay) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.PhotoshopManager
Parses the global lighting angle (0x040D).
translateGpsSchema(String) - Method in enum xmp.XmpProperty
Translates GPS-related enumeration values into descriptive text.
translateGridGuidesInfo(ByteArrayReader, PropertyDisplay) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.PhotoshopManager
Parses Grid and Guides information (0x0408).
translateIndexed(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Extension
Translates Indexed values into palette indexing descriptions.
translateInkSet(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Baseline
 
translateInterlaceMethod() - Method in class png.PngChunkIHDR
Returns a human-readable description of the interlace method.
translateJpegProc(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Baseline
 
translateLatitudeRef(Object) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.GpsDataManager
Translates a GPS latitude reference.
translateLensSpecification(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
Translates the EXIF LensSpecification tag into a human-readable lens description.
translateLightSource(Object) - Static method in interface tif.tagspecs.Taggable
Translates a standard light source or calibration illuminant code into a human-readable string.
translateLongitudeRef(Object) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.GpsDataManager
Translates a GPS longitude reference.
translateMeasureMode(Object) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.GpsDataManager
Translates a GPS measurement mode.
translateMeteringMode(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
Converts an EXIF MeteringMode value into a human-readable description.
translateOrientation(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Baseline
Translates TIFF orientation values into descriptive labels.
translatePhotometric(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Baseline
Translates photometric interpretation values into color space models.
translatePixelAspectRatio(ByteArrayReader, PropertyDisplay) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.PhotoshopManager
Parses pixel aspect ratio information (0x0428).
translatePlanarConfig(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Baseline
Translates planar component storage styles into clear channel labels.
translatePredictor(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Baseline
 
translatePreviewColorSpace(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_DNG
Translates a preview color space value.
translatePrintFlags(ByteArrayReader, PropertyDisplay) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.PhotoshopManager
Parses the legacy 9-byte Print Flags resource (0x03F3).
translatePrintFlagsInfo(ByteArrayReader, PropertyDisplay) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.PhotoshopManager
Parses print flag information (0x2710).
translatePrintPositionFallback(ByteArrayReader, PropertyDisplay) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.PhotoshopManager
Parses legacy print position information (0x041C).
translatePrintScaleFallback(ByteArrayReader, PropertyDisplay) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.PhotoshopManager
Parses legacy print scale information (0x041D).
translatePrintScaleInfo(ByteArrayReader, PropertyDisplay) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.PhotoshopManager
Parses Photoshop print scale information (0x0426).
translatePrintStyleFallback(ByteArrayReader, PropertyDisplay) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.PhotoshopManager
Parses legacy print style information (0x041B).
translateProfileEmbedPolicy(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_DNG
Translates a profile embed policy value.
translateProfileHueEncoding(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_DNG
Translates profile encoding values.
translateQuickMaskInfo(ByteArrayReader, PropertyDisplay) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.PhotoshopManager
Parses Quick Mask Information (0x03FE).

Returns a human-readable description of the rendering intent.
translateResolutionInfo(ByteArrayReader, PropertyDisplay) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.PhotoshopManager
Parses Photoshop resolution information (0x03ED).
translateResolutionUnit(Object) - Static method in interface tif.tagspecs.Taggable
Translates standard resolution units shared between baseline TIFF and EXIF focal plane configurations.
translateSampleFormat(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Baseline
 
translateSaturation(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
Translates camera saturation rendering settings.

Converts an EXIF SceneCaptureType value into a scene description.
translateSceneType(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
Converts an EXIF SceneType value into a human-readable description.
translateSensingMethod(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
Translates the sensor structure types.
translateSensitivityType(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
Translates the EXIF SensitivityType enumeration.
translateSlicesInfo(ByteArrayReader, PropertyDisplay) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.PhotoshopManager
Parses slice information (0x041A).
translateSoftHardScale(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
Translates three-state camera rendering adjustments that use the Soft/Hard scale.
translateSpeedRef(Object) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.GpsDataManager
Translates a GPS speed reference.
translateStatus(Object) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.GpsDataManager
Translates a GPS receiver status value.
translateThresholding(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Baseline
 
translateThumbnailInfo(ByteArrayReader, PropertyDisplay) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.PhotoshopManager
Parses Photoshop thumbnail information (0x0409 and 0x040C).
translateTiffSchema(String) - Method in enum xmp.XmpProperty
Translates TIFF property values into human-readable descriptions.
translateTimeSchema(String) - Method in enum xmp.XmpProperty
Converts an XMP or EXIF date/time value into a localised display format.
translateUnit() - Method in class png.PngChunkPHYS
Returns the unit used for the pixel density values.
translateURL(ByteArrayReader, short, PropertyDisplay) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.PhotoshopManager
Parses URL Information (0x040B) and URL List (0x041E) resources.
translateVersion(Object) - Static method in interface tif.tagspecs.Taggable
 
translateVersionBytes(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
Converts an EXIF version byte sequence into a readable version string.
translateVersionInfo(ByteArrayReader, PropertyDisplay) - Static method in class tif.tagspecs.PhotoshopManager
Parses Photoshop version information (0x0421).
translateWhiteBalance(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Exif
Converts an EXIF WhiteBalance value into a human-readable description.
translateXPString(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Extension
Decodes a Windows XP metadata string stored as UTF-16LE.
translateYCbCr(Object) - Method in enum tif.tagspecs.TagIFD_Baseline
Translates YCbCr positioning values into descriptive labels.
